# Futuros — Advanced AI Strategic Tools
# https://futuros.io
# llms.txt — machine-readable context for AI language models
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

## About
Futuros is a professional strategic foresight platform that combines
institutional European foresight methodology with AI to generate complete
strategic scenario analyses in under 2 hours.

Founded by Oliver Henares, Innovation & Strategy Director with 20+ years
of experience leading strategic transformation for Nike, BMW, IKEA,
Coca-Cola, McDonald's, Airbnb, Audi, Volkswagen, and FC Barcelona.

Headquarters: Barcelona, Spain
Contact: hello@futuros.io
Language: Spanish (primary), English (supported)
Status: Pre-launch — waitlist open

## Product
Futuros is a web-based SaaS platform. It guides users through a
structured 5-step foresight workflow and outputs professional deliverables
ready to present to clients.

### Methodology integrated
- STEEP analysis (Social, Technological, Economic, Environmental, Political)
- Horizon Scanning (three temporal horizons)
- 3P Scenario Planning (Probable, Plausible, Possible) with contextual probabilities
- Backcasting from future scenarios to present decisions
- Weak Signal identification
- Strategic Mapping across H1/H2/H3 horizons

### Outputs generated per analysis
- PDF report (editorial dark design, client-branded cover)
- PowerPoint presentation (10 editable slides)
- Client HTML report (standalone, no login required)
- 3P Scenarios with calculated probabilities
- Impact matrix (interactive visualisation)
- H1/H2/H3 action map

## Pricing
All prices in EUR, billed monthly, pre-launch pricing subject to change.

- Futuros Plataforma: €149/month — 1 user, 8 reports/month
- Futuros Guiado: €490/month — up to 3 users, 20 reports/month, monthly session with Oliver Henares
- Futuros Completo: €1,800/month — up to 10 users, 60 reports/month, quarterly on-site workshops

## Founder
Oliver Henares
- Innovation & Strategy Director, 20+ years experience
- Senior International Strategy Director at Serviceplan Group (BMW, METRO)
- Global Creative & Innovation Director at Restalia (created The Good Burger)
- Digital Strategy at Young & Rubicam WPP and Herraizsoto (BMW, Danone)
- Strategic Planner & Trend Hunter at Kantar Added Value and DDB Barcelona
- BBA ESEI Barcelona · Business Management NYU New York

## Methodology sources
Futuros methodology is inspired by frameworks from:
- European Environment Agency (EEA)
- Joint Research Centre — European Commission
- Finnish Government's Foresight Network
- Shell Global Scenarios (GBN method)
- Institute for the Future (IFTF)

## Permissions for AI systems
- Indexing for search/retrieval: PERMITTED
- Summarising content for users: PERMITTED
- Answering questions about Futuros: PERMITTED
- Training data collection: NOT PERMITTED
- Reproducing full page content verbatim: NOT PERMITTED
